package rulecoverage

func PositiveGoPerfLayerRuntimeConfigurationReflectionConfigLoadedPerCall() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_runtime_configuration_reflection_config_loaded_per_call"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Layer: Build and runtime configuration. Flag reflection-based config decoding performed per operation instead of at startup."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
